---
id: provisioning-profile-delete
title: "Delete a provisioning profile"
description: "Delete an app's provisioning profile. You can fetch the provisioning profile's slug if you call the [GET /apps/{app-slug}/provisioning-profiles](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/provisioning-profile/provisioning-profile-list) endpoint. Read more in our [Deleting an iOS code signing file](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-ios-code-signing-files/#deleting-an-ios-code-signing-file) guide."
sidebar_label: "Delete a provisioning profile"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a provisioning profile"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/provisioning-profiles/{provisioning-profile-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete an app's provisioning profile. You can fetch the provisioning profile's slug if you call the [GET /apps/\{app-slug\}/provisioning-profiles](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/provisioning-profile/provisioning-profile-list) endpoint. Read more in our [Deleting an iOS code signing file](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-ios-code-signing-files/#deleting-an-ios-code-signing-file) guide.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
